title: The solo founder tech stack (2026 edition)

slides.headline: My 2026 solo founder stack
slides.visual_note: Solo developer silhouette with tech logos floating

slides.headline: Code: Claude Code + Cursor
slides.body: Claude Code for overnight builds (runs autonomously). Cursor for real-time pair programming. Cost: $20/month each.

slides.headline: Frontend: Next.js + Tailwind
slides.body: Next.js 15 with App Router. Tailwind for styling. shadcn/ui for components. Deploys to Vercel in 30 seconds.

slides.headline: Mobile: React Native + Expo
slides.body: One codebase, iOS and Android. Expo for easy builds. EAS for app store submissions. Skip Swift/Kotlin entirely.
slides.visual_note: React Native logo with phone mockups

slides.headline: Backend: Supabase
slides.body: Postgres database. Auth built-in. Edge functions. Real-time subscriptions. Free tier handles most MVPs.

slides.headline: Payments: Stripe + RevenueCat
slides.body: Stripe for web. RevenueCat for mobile subscriptions. Both handle taxes, refunds, analytics. Set up once, forget.

slides.headline: Content: Remotion + ElevenLabs
slides.body: Remotion for programmatic videos. ElevenLabs for AI voiceovers. Generate 100 TikToks while you sleep.

slides.headline: Analytics: PostHog + Plausible
slides.body: PostHog for product analytics (funnels, cohorts). Plausible for privacy-friendly web analytics. Both have generous free tiers.

slides.headline: Total monthly cost
slides.body: Claude Code: $20. Cursor: $20. Vercel: $0. Supabase: $0. RevenueCat: $0. PostHog: $0. Total: $40/month to run a SaaS.

cta_slide.headline: I share my stack updates weekly
